description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a deep blue upholstered finish and a minimalist design. The sofa features a chaise lounge extension on the left side, providing ample space for lounging or seating multiple people. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, forming a continuous, straight-edged perimeter around the seating area. The sofa sits on six sturdy, light wood block legs that are evenly spaced at the corners and along the base for support. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall design is functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in deep blue upholstery with a chaise lounge and light wood block legs. The design is sleek, minimalist, and well-suited for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, chaise lounge on the left, and the sofa's continuous back and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, continuous backrest and the arrangement of the six wooden legs.
description_view_3: Side view from the chaise end, emphasizing the length of the lounge and the sofa's block leg supports.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached back cushions, all uniform in size and forming a continuous sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, block-style armrests at both ends, equal in height to the backrest, with a minimalist, padded appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six exposed block legs made of light wood, positioned at the corners and midpoints for support, with a simple, sturdy rectangular profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest running along both sections of the sofa, with attached cushions and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid deep blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
